transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (from CDV-050) - maintainer to confirm/reassign within SPEC-CARD-01 bucket

difficulty_tier straightforward (01) / diagnosis_category important_not_to_miss - classic switch-like recurrent paroxysmal SVT history with suspected pre-excitation (WPW); the reasoning is a recognisable pattern rather than an atypical/zebra presentation, but it is time-sensitive and easy to under-call as anxiety, hence important_not_to_miss

tier driven by source stability: episode had SELF-TERMINATED and the patient is stable and in sinus rhythm at contact (unlike an unstable/pre-excited-AF presentation), so baseline tier is T3 (urgent same-day/next-morning review to secure a priority resting ECG + cardiology/EP referral), consistent with the source's 'urgent GP review within 24 hours'; T5 escalation edge for a non-terminating/syncopal/irregular/chest-pain future episode

CRITICAL clinical-safety encoding: AV-nodal blocking drugs (adenosine, verapamil/diltiazem, digoxin, beta-blockers) are contraindicated in pre-excited AF and are encoded as should_NOT_recommend errors of commission for home self-treatment; the delta wave / short PR / widened QRS on 12-lead ECG is the sealed diagnostic finding (RF-004 present_and_non_disclosable + telehealth_limits); definitive treatment is EP referral for accessory-pathway ablation
age 20 stated (adult); sex not stated in source - inferred female for narrative consistency only, flagged for clinician confirmation
next of kin not specified (lives alone) - contact_nok relationship 'not_specified', available false

telehealth reprojection applied - in-person after-hours home visit with structural cardiovascular examination reprojected to telehealth_chat; the presentation layer was de-anchored to how the patient would present before the diagnosis was known; resting 12-lead ECG (short PR/delta wave/widened QRS) and structural exam sealed to 10/11

clinician-measured normal vitals/exam (BP 115/75, HR 72, structurally normal heart) NOT carried into 01 as clinician findings; only a patient-self-checked resting pulse (~72, regular, now that the episode resolved) retained in 01.objective_data_offered as patient_reported/unverified; she could not reliably count the rate during the episode

no dose fabricated - AV-nodal blockers encoded as should_NOT_recommend for self-treatment (safety), energy drinks/stimulants encoded should_NOT_recommend as a trigger to eliminate; modified Valsalva included as a telehealth-coachable self-help step for a FUTURE episode
no PMH/allergies/FHx/guideline citation in source - left empty/omitted; comorbidities empty
involves_pharmacology_check set true in 00 because the pre-excitation diagnosis changes emergency drug safety (AV-nodal blocker contraindication in pre-excited AF)

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
